# Australian Linen & Towels

> Wholesale supplier of premium commercial linens, towels, and bed sheets for hotels, motels, spas, resorts, and hospitality businesses across Australia. Based in Griffith, NSW. Trade pricing available with no minimum order quantity.

## About

Australian Linen & Towels is a B2B wholesale supplier serving the Australian hospitality industry. We provide hotel-grade commercial textiles designed to withstand industrial laundering while maintaining a premium look and feel. Our customers include boutique hotels, motels, day spas, beauty salons, resorts, gyms, and hospitality businesses across all Australian states.

- **Business Type:** Wholesale / B2B
- **Location:** Griffith, NSW, Australia
- **Service Area:** All of Australia (free shipping on orders over AU$100)
- **Contact:** info@auslinenandtowels.com.au · 0414 533 449
- **Website:** https://auslinenandtowels.com.au

## Product Range

### Commercial Towels
- White towels (bath, hand, face, bath mat)
- Charcoal towels (bath, hand, face)
- Camel towels (bath, hand)
- All towels are 100% combed cotton, hospitality-grade

### Bed Linen
- White flat sheets (Single, Double, Queen, King)
- White fitted sheets (Queen, King)
- Pillowcases (Standard, King)
- Cotton-polyester blend, designed for high-volume laundering

### Other
- Mattress protectors (Queen, King) — waterproof, noiseless

## Key Selling Points

- 20+ years of industry experience in commercial textiles
- Free Australia-wide shipping on orders over AU$100
- No minimum order quantity — buy what you need
- Trade pricing available for hospitality businesses
- Net 30 terms for approved credit accounts
- Stock items typically ship within 1–2 business days

## Pages

## Common Questions

**What is GSM?** GSM (grams per square metre) measures towel density. Higher GSM means thicker, more absorbent towels. Hotels typically use 450–700 GSM.

**Do you offer trade pricing?** Yes, contact us with your business details for a wholesale quote.

**Do you ship Australia-wide?** Yes, free shipping on orders over AU$100. Delivery takes 3–8 business days depending on location.

**Do you offer coloured towels?** Yes, we offer towels in a range of colours. Contact us for available colourways.
